membership_assumption: Constituents held static between weekly Friday snapshots. Index typically rebalances quarterly; weekly oversamples membership and protects against off-cycle add/drops.

carry_forwards.reason: no holdings data within 5 days back from target Friday — reused most recent prior snapshot
